title: New ClawHub skill: dev-prompts — 150 developer productivity prompts, free
content:
Prompts are the cheapest lever for agent quality. So we packaged 150 curated developer-productivity prompts and published them free on ClawHub as the dev-prompts skill.

Categories: planning & scoping, debugging & root-cause, code review checklists, refactoring & DRY, docs & READMEs, tests & edge cases. Paste any block straight into OpenClaw, Hermes, or your editor.

No code to run — the prompts live in PROMPTS.md. MIT licensed, offline, zero deps.

ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/dev-prompts

An expanded bundle (500+ prompts + a prompt-linter) is on Gumroad for those who want more. Free core stays free. Sponsoring the builder (GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee) keeps the free packs coming.
